local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: git show --name-only --format= HEAD matched 43 personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw/crawler/compute-*20260706* files, and git ls-files confirmed all 43 are tracked in commit bebfebd.
local_checks.wiki_search: Before this reconciliation, targeted rg scans found 20260706/baseline-dirty language in ingest.md, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, ai-infra-coverage-map.md, and prior r3/r4 manifests; Compute Accelerator Crawl Inventory and Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison cited June captures but no July 6 baseline paths.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki/index.md already links Compute Accelerator Crawl Inventory, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, Compute Accelerator Spec Catalog, Compute Accelerator Field Glossary, and Compute Accelerator Spec Sources, so no duplicate compute accelerator page is needed.

gap_reason: State and curated hardware pages still treated the July 6 compute accelerator baseline as baseline-dirty or out-of-scope even though commit bebfebd now tracks the captures. The gap is reconciliation and duplicate-boundary proof, not new crawling.
